task: Wave 6 4-vertical persistence to Supabase offmarket schema
method: Direct SQL via execute_sql MCP (offmarket schema not exposed in PostgREST). Used WITH CTE chained INSERTs: businesses -> return id+legal_name -> JOIN VALUES list of scores -> INSERT business_scores. Batched ~25 records per CTE statement.

schema_notes.offmarket.businesses: All records inserted with vertical, legal_name, and available address/contact/owner/entity fields. distress_reasons + data_sources as jsonb. license_issue_date cast to ::date.
schema_notes.offmarket.business_scores: Linked via business_id returned from businesses RETURNING. score_run_id cast to ::uuid. Tier values normalized to long form (A_acquire_self|B_forward|C_watch|D_pass). All records used layer1_base_rate (not layer1_score); no source field-name normalization needed.
